# ExímIA Ventures

> Strategic intelligence that amplifies yours.

ExímIA Ventures (também: eximia, eximiaventures) é uma empresa brasileira de inteligência artificial e consultoria estratégica, sediada em Ribeirão Preto, Brasil. Atua em três verticais: Studio (cockpit integrado), Academy (educação corporativa) e Excellence (excelência operacional).

## Products & Services

### Studio
Integrated command cockpit for executives. Eliminates system fragmentation, delivering total vision and real control in a unified interface. Clients stop being hostage to tools and start piloting their business.

### Academy
Corporate education platform powered by AI. Reveals the human potential companies already possess. Methodology based on silent discovery — professionals learn without public exposure, emerging more capable.

### Excellence
Operational excellence consulting. Integrates data, processes and systems for real visibility and sustainable control. Focus on agribusiness and high operational complexity sectors.

## Identity

- **Name:** ExímIA Ventures
- **Also known as:** eximia, eximiaventures, exímia
- **Location:** Ribeirão Preto, Brazil
- **Segments:** Agribusiness, Corporate Education, Digital Transformation, Operational Excellence
- **Differentiator:** AI applied to the human, not just the process. Intelligence amplification, not replacement.
